title: Crossbow to Gauss gun from Black Mesa (Half-Life)
description: A small resource pack that replaces crossbow with Gauss gun (Tau cannon) from Black mesa
body:
This resource pack replaces the crossbow with the Gauss cannon from the game Black Mesa (Half-Life remake), with the accompanying weapon charge animation and modified arrow model (regular and spectral).
![model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309576d79e96daacab73e160b2b6d0572f57444a.png)

sounds from original game, model by Arty
